scripts.build: node scripts/build-dist.mjs && npx sass src/scss/main.scss dist/css/main.css
scripts.build:sass: node scripts/build-dist.mjs && npx sass src/scss/main.scss dist/css/main.css --style=expanded
scripts.build:sass:prod: node scripts/build-dist.mjs && npx sass src/scss/main.scss dist/css/main.css --style=compressed
